CVE-2025-12819.title: Untrusted search path in auth_query connection handler in PgBounc ...
CVE-2025-12819.description: Untrusted search path in auth_query connection handler in PgBouncer before 1.25.1 allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary SQL during authentication via a malicious search_path parameter in the StartupMessage.
